---
title: "Manual_Peak_Picking"
author: "Sarah Moseley"
date: "2026-05-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Setup

```{r}

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)

# -----------------------------
# File paths
# -----------------------------

## Setup File Paths Safely

logs_dir <- "E:/Logs"

manual_peak_file <- list.files(
  logs_dir,
  pattern = "Analysis_Progress",
  full.names = TRUE
)[1]

detections_file <- list.files(
  logs_dir,
  pattern = "ADRIFT_GgDetections",
  full.names = TRUE
)[1]

cat("Manual peak file found:\n")
print(manual_peak_file)

cat("\nDetection file found:\n")
print(detections_file)

if (is.na(manual_peak_file) || !file.exists(manual_peak_file)) {
  stop("Could not find Analysis_Progress file in E:/Logs.")
}

if (is.na(detections_file) || !file.exists(detections_file)) {
  stop("Could not find ADRIFT_GgDetections file in E:/Logs.")
}

manual_peak_ext <- tools::file_ext(manual_peak_file)
detections_ext <- tools::file_ext(detections_file)

cat("\nManual peak file extension:", manual_peak_ext, "\n")
cat("Detection file extension:", detections_ext, "\n")

if (manual_peak_ext %in% c("xlsx", "xls")) {
  cat("\nManual peak file sheets:\n")
  print(excel_sheets(manual_peak_file))
}

if (detections_ext %in% c("xlsx", "xls")) {
  cat("\nDetection file sheets:\n")
  print(excel_sheets(detections_file))
}

# -----------------------------
# Output folder
# -----------------------------

output_dir <- "E:/Analysis/Manual_Peak_Geographic_Plots"

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

plot_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "plots")
table_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "tables")

dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

cat("Manual peak file:\n", manual_peak_file, "\n\n")
cat("Detection metadata file:\n", detections_file, "\n\n")
cat("Output directory:\n", output_dir, "\n")

```

## Load Manual Peak Table

```{r}

cat("Manual peak file sheets:\n")
print(excel_sheets(manual_peak_file))

cat("\nDetection file sheets:\n")
print(excel_sheets(detections_file))

```
